title: Bubble Construct
description: This mod adds bubbles to help you in building
body:
This mod adds some bubble building blocks to help you build your projects

To get started craft the new bubble maker with 2 iron nuggets, 1 iron and 2 bottles
![Bubble Maker Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fabf80596208ab7f7d7d2224e6e6978231e4b4b.png)

Then, use the bubble maker on a crafting grid to select to craft between 3 new blocks insta-minable with the hands
![Bubble Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eecf23648ec3f502ca76e807b7c97c32bfe8cb99.png)
